strategy: Tiny 675-health Life boss. Hit with Death (+40%) and never Life (70% resist).
From round 3 on, if he has no trap on him he heals with Helping Hands. Keep at least one trap stuck on him and the healing stops entirely.
With his low health, stack a blade and a trap, then kill him before round 3 or right through the heal cheat.
cheatNotes: Starting round 3, an untrapped Chester heals himself with Helping Hands every time the heal wears off. Keep a single trap on him and the healing stops completely.
